children.label: A
children.text: the effective price for the covered commodity for the crop year; is less than

children.label: B
children.text: the reference price for the covered commodity for the crop year; or

children.label: A
children.text: the effective price for the covered commodity for the crop year; is less than

children.label: B
children.text: the effective reference price for the covered commodity for the crop year.
the national average market price received by producers during the 12-month marketing year for the covered commodity, as determined by the Secretary; or
the national average loan rate for a marketing assistance loan for the covered commodity in effect for such crop year under subchapter II.

children.label: i
children.text: the reference price for the covered commodity; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the effective price determined under subsection (b) for the covered commodity.

children.label: i
children.text: the effective reference price for the covered commodity; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the effective price determined under subsection (b) for the covered commodity.

children.heading: Announcement
children.label: 2 Announcement
children.text: Not later than 30 days after the end of each applicable 12-month marketing year for each covered commodity, the Secretary shall publish the payment rate determined under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Insufficient data
children.label: 3 Insufficient data
children.text: In the case of a covered commodity, such as temperate japonica rice, for which the Secretary cannot determine the payment rate for the most recent 12-month marketing year by the date described in paragraph (2) due to insufficient reporting of timely pricing data by 1 or more nongovernmental entities, including a marketing cooperative for the covered commodity, the Secretary shall publish the payment rate as soon as practicable after the marketing year data are made available.
the payment rate for the covered commodity under subsection (c);
the payment yield for the covered commodity; and
the payment acres for the covered commodity.

children.heading: Time for payments
children.label: e Time for payments
children.text: If the Secretary determines under this section that price loss coverage payments are required to be provided for the covered commodity, the payments shall be made beginning October 1, or as soon as practicable thereafter, after the end of the applicable marketing year for the covered commodity.

children.heading: Effective price for barley
children.label: f Effective price for barley
children.text: In determining the effective price for barley under subsection (b), the Secretary shall use the all-barley price.

children.heading: Reference price for temperate japonica rice
children.label: g Reference price for temperate japonica rice

children.text: the simple average of the marketing year average price of medium grain rice from the 2017 through 2021 crop years; by
the simple average of the marketing year average price of all rice from the 2017 through 2021 crop years.

children.heading: Effective price for seed cotton
children.label: h Effective price for seed cotton

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The effective price for seed cotton under subsection (b) shall be equal to the marketing year average price for seed cotton, as calculated under paragraph (2).

children.label: I
children.text: the upland cotton lint marketing year average price; and

children.label: II
children.text: the total United States upland cotton lint production, measured in pounds; and

children.label: I
children.text: the cottonseed marketing year average price; and

children.label: II
children.text: the total United States cottonseed production, measured in pounds; by

children.label: i
children.text: the total United States upland cotton lint production, measured in pounds; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the total United States cottonseed production, measured in pounds.
